sql.i: select rowguid,configname,configvalue,addtime,remark from abs_sysconfig where $like(configname,configname) and $equal(userguid,userguid) order by addtime desc
select count(1) from abs_sysconfig where $like(configname,configname) and $equal(userguid,userguid)
select rowguid,configname,configvalue,addtime,remark from abs_sysconfig where $like(configname,configname) and userguid is null order by addtime desc
select count(1) from abs_sysconfig where $like(configname,configname) and $equal(userguid,userguid) and userguid is null
select count(1) from abs_sysconfig where configname={configname} and $unequal(rowguid,rowguid) and $unequal(userguid,userguid)
select rowguid,userguid,configname,configvalue,addtime,remark from abs_sysconfig where userguid={userguid} and configname={configname}
select configvalue from abs_sysconfig where configname={configname} and userguid is null
select configvalue from abs_sysconfig where configname={configname} and userguid={userguid}
